benefits.description: Increased range of motion in shoulder within an hour of IM injection; effect noticeable but lasts less than a day

protocol_notes: First BPC injection was administered by an RN directly into the rotator cuff. Subsequent self-administered IM shoulder injections were more effective than subQ or oral administration. Oral pill form was also tried with no results. SubQ also tried with poor results. IM local injection felt significantly better.
